title: Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates:
Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates!
